calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming That Real Prop. Is An Asset Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marita Beckum and Janice Lawrence for Michele Armanino.

The Court stated that the issues regarding notice to the minor beneficiary and record title had been resolved and it was prepared to sign the order. There being no additional comments by counsel, the petition is granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
